description: A clinic coordinator needs to add patient Margaret Wilson to the 'Orthopedic Surgery' waiting list in OSCAR EMR (http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.do). Use credentials: username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', PIN '1117'. If the 'Orthopedic Surgery' list does not exist, create it. Add the following note to her entry: 'Awaiting total hip replacement - left side. Moderate osteoarthritis. Target surgery date Q2 2025.' Ensure the entry is saved so she appears on the list with the specified note.
